scripts.dev: pnpm --filter api dev & pnpm --filter web dev
scripts.deploy:staging: git diff --quiet HEAD || (echo 'Deploy blocked: uncommitted changes' >&2 && exit 1) && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jigs/cdk deploy:staging -- --require-approval never && aws ssm put-parameter --name /jigs/staging/deploy-commit --value $(git rev-parse HEAD) --type String --overwrite --region us-west-2
scripts.deploy:prod: git diff --quiet HEAD || (echo 'Deploy blocked: uncommitted changes' >&2 && exit 1) && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jigs/cdk deploy:prod -- --require-approval never && aws ssm put-parameter --name /jigs/prod/deploy-commit --value $(git rev-parse HEAD) --type String --overwrite --region eu-central-1
